items.title_en: Trump accounts sign up 5 million kids, with 1.2 million eligible for $1,000 seed money, Bessent says

items.title_en: Power Insider: The markets are obsessed with the Strait of Hormuz. Why it matters less than you think

items.desc_en: Retail and pro traders are obsessed with gauging the traffic in the Strait of Hormuz, thinking they can gain an edge on where oil prices are going. They can’t.

items.desc_zh: 美国财政部长表示，为了消除伊朗对西方首都发动袭击的威胁，“一点点经济痛苦”是值得的。
